description_long: This is a modern, low-floor city bus with a predominantly light green exterior and a yellow accent stripe running along the lower side panels. The bus features large, rectangular tinted windows evenly spaced along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. There are two wide, black-framed passenger doors on the right side, one at the front and one in the middle, both designed for easy boarding and alighting. The front of the bus has a large windshield, a destination sign area above it, and a pair of headlights integrated into a black fascia. The rear and left side of the bus are simpler, with no visible doors and a continuation of the window pattern. The bus rides on four black wheels and has a streamlined, boxy shape typical of urban transit vehicles.
description: A light green, low-floor city bus with large rectangular windows, two wide passenger doors on the right side, and a yellow accent stripe along the lower panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black fascia, headlights, and the large windshield with a destination sign area above.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the continuous row of large windows and the yellow accent stripe, with no visible doors.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back window, taillights, and the simple, flat rear panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing two wide passenger doors, large windows, and the yellow accent stripe.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along each side, separated by vertical pillars, with consistent size and shape throughout.
